title: HTA Landscaping Extraction Record
description: JSON Schema for extracting HTA landscaping information from collected documents. The extraction sections mirror the prior Sanofi HTA workbook schema, with additional pipeline metadata, timeline metadata, and traceability wrappers.

flag.description: Whether this topic was a cited driver of the HTA outcome.

indication.title: Indication
indication.description: Old schema rule: Leave blank in the notebook workflow and populate from filename. In this pipeline, populate from extracted document text or later indication normalization.

country.title: Country
country.description: Old schema rule: Leave blank in the notebook workflow and populate from filename. In this pipeline, populate from retrieval metadata.

brand_and_company.title: Brand and Company
brand_and_company.description: Brand, INN, and manufacturer for the index drug.

regulatory_approval.title: Regulatory Approval
regulatory_approval.description: Indication text or patient population for which the index drug is approved as per the regulatory label.

hta_outcome.title: HTA Outcome
hta_outcome.description: Free-text rationale describing favourability of the HTA recommendation, from very favourable/no restrictions to very unfavourable/no access. Include France SMR/ASMR or Germany added-benefit ratings when applicable.

reimbursed_population.title: Reimbursed Population
reimbursed_population.description: Reimbursed population and restrictions versus regulatory label.

cited_driver_efficacy_vs_comparator.title: Cited Driver: Efficacy vs Comparator
cited_driver_efficacy_vs_comparator.description: Whether direct efficacy versus comparator was a key HTA outcome driver, excluding NMA/ITC evidence.

cited_driver_nma_itc_results.title: Cited Driver: NMA/ITC Results
cited_driver_nma_itc_results.description: Whether NMA/ITC evidence was a key HTA outcome driver.

cited_driver_safety_tolerability.title: Cited Driver: Safety / Tolerability
cited_driver_safety_tolerability.description: Whether safety or tolerability was a key HTA outcome driver.

cited_driver_qol.title: Cited Driver: QoL
cited_driver_qol.description: Whether quality of life evidence was a key HTA outcome driver.

cited_driver_economic_factors.title: Cited Driver: Economic Factors
cited_driver_economic_factors.description: Whether economic factors were a key HTA outcome driver.

cited_driver_unmet_need_innovation.title: Cited Driver: Unmet Need / Innovation
cited_driver_unmet_need_innovation.description: Whether unmet need or innovation was a key HTA outcome driver.

rationale.title: Rationale
rationale.description: Key discussion points explaining how the recommendation was reached, including evidence quality, submitted population, innovation/unmet need, comparators, and endpoint acceptability.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Additional remarks, including subgroups, multiple-report context, latest-version additions, IGA scale issues, and guideline-positioning commentary when available.

brand_and_company.title: Brand and Company
brand_and_company.description: Brand, INN, and manufacturer for the index drug.

pivotal_trial.title: Pivotal Trial
pivotal_trial.description: Name of pivotal trial driving the submission, plus clearly labelled other supporting trials when used by the agency.

included_population.title: Included Population
included_population.description: Populations included in pivotal and other relevant trials, including general and subgroup populations.

design.title: Design
design.description: Pivotal and other relevant trial designs.

outcome_week.title: Outcome Week
outcome_week.description: Outcome collection timepoints by population, subpopulation, comparator, and trial.

arm_and_efficacy_results.title: Arm and Efficacy Results
arm_and_efficacy_results.description: Efficacy results by trial arm and agency commentary on acceptability.

qol.title: QoL
qol.description: Quality-of-life results by trial arm and agency commentary on acceptability.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Key safety results and agency perception of product safety.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Overall remarks on evidence quality, prioritization, and impact on HTA assessment.

agency.title: Agency
agency.description: HTA body or evidence source conducting or reviewing the NMA/ITC.

submission_and_type.title: Submission & Type
submission_and_type.description: Type of submission or analysis, such as Bayesian NMA, meta-analysis, NMA, or ITC.

treatments_and_trials.title: Treatments (and trials)
treatments_and_trials.description: Comparators and included trials used to demonstrate evidence for the index drug.

population.title: Population
population.description: Specific population analyzed in the NMA/ITC.

key_results.title: Key Results
key_results.description: Qualitative summary of NMA/ITC results and acceptability.

key_hta_comment.title: Key HTA Comment
key_hta_comment.description: Agency interpretation, methodological notes, limitations, and impact on decision.

agency.title: Agency
agency.description: HTA body or evidence source conducting or reviewing the economic evaluation.

model_type.title: Model Type
model_type.description: Type of economic model used for the index drug.

time_horizon.title: Time horizon
time_horizon.description: Model time horizon and relationship between available evidence duration and modeled duration.

comparators.title: Comparators
comparators.description: Comparators used in the economic model and whether they align with guideline, clinical, and trial comparators.

population.title: Population
population.description: Patient population used in the economic model, including subgroups when analyzed.

utility_data_and_key_results.title: Utility Data and Key Results
utility_data_and_key_results.description: Utility data used and committee conclusions about economic model outcomes.

key_results.title: Key Results
key_results.description: Overall agency considerations about model acceptability, strengths, limitations, evidence reliability, and local-practice fit.

treatment_flow.title: Treatment Flow
treatment_flow.description: Treatment sequencing and rationale from the agency or society.

mentioned_drugs.title: Mentioned drugs
mentioned_drugs.description: Treatments mentioned and commentary on each, including disease-specific products of interest.

alignment_with_hta.title: Alignment with HTA
alignment_with_hta.description: Commentary on whether guideline positioning and treatment value are reflected in HTA reports, including convergence or divergence.

notes.title: Notes
notes.description: Additional evidence-quality, endpoint, patient-segment, trial-duration, and evidence-generation considerations.
